title: DFD Level 0 & Level 1 — Hotel Management System
examTip: In a Hotel Management DFD, ensure you show how the guest interacts with the room booking process (Level 1) and how services (food, laundry) add charges to the guest bill. Make sure that room availability status and reservation details are kept in separate data stores (D1 and D2) to represent accurate operational state.
theory:
A Hotel Management System DFD maps the flow of booking info, room states, services, and transactions. Modeling these pathways helps developers structure databases and program APIs to handle reservations and invoicing smoothly.

Level 0 Context Diagram: Shows the data exchanges between the system and three main entities: Guest, Receptionist, and Hotel Manager. The Guest sends booking parameters and payment data and receives confirmations and invoices. The Receptionist submits guest check-in details and allocates rooms. The Manager extracts sales and occupancy report summaries.

Level 1 Detail DFD: Decomposes system operations into four main processes:
1. 1.1 Room Search & Booking: Guests request dates and room types. The process queries 'D1: Room Availability DB' to check vacancies. If a room is free, it registers the reservation in 'D2: Bookings Registry' and sends a confirmation.
2. 1.2 Guest Check-In / Check-Out: The Receptionist updates the booking status upon guest arrival, writes detail to 'D3: Guest Profiles', and sets room availability to 'occupied' in 'D1'.
3. 1.3 Food & Service Ordering: Captures custom orders (room service, dining) and logs the charges in 'D4: Services & Orders Log' linked to the guest's room ID.
4. 1.4 Bill Generation & Payment: When checking out, the system reads base room tariffs from 'D2', aggregates extra service charges from 'D4', pulls guest ID data from 'D3', processes payment, updates room status in 'D1' back to 'available', and prints the receipt.
keyPoints: Level 0 Context diagram encapsulates the data boundary between the hotel system, guest, clerk, and manager
Level 1 DFD separates room booking, guest registration, service ordering, and final checkout billing
D1: Room Availability DB stores real-time room statuses (vacant, dirty, occupied, under maintenance)
D2: Bookings Registry tracks customer reservation details, tariffs, deposit amounts, and booking windows
D4: Services & Orders Log aggregates miscellaneous billing items like dining, laundry, and minibar usage
useCases: Designing cloud-based reservation platforms for hotel chains, motels, and luxury resorts
Integrating front-desk PMS (Property Management Systems) with room-service POS networks
Streamlining guest billing and auditing workflows in hospitality operations
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
  subgraph L0["Level 0: Context DFD"]
    direction LR
    GuestL0["Hotel Guest"]:::dfdEntity
    HotelSystem["1.0 Hotel Management System"]:::dfdProcess
    ReceptionistL0["Receptionist / Clerk"]:::dfdEntity
    ManagerL0["Hotel Manager"]:::dfdEntity
    
    GuestL0 -->|"Booking Parameters & Payment"| HotelSystem
    HotelSystem -->|"Booking Confirmation & Invoice"| GuestL0
    ReceptionistL0 -->|"Check-in / Check-out Details"| HotelSystem
    HotelSystem -->|"Room Statuses & Keys"| ReceptionistL0
    HotelSystem -->|"Occupancy & Sales Reports"| ManagerL0
  end

  subgraph L1["Level 1: Detail DFD"]
    direction TB
    GuestL1["Hotel Guest"]:::dfdEntity
    ReceptionistL1["Receptionist / Clerk"]:::dfdEntity
    
    P1["1.1 Room Search & Booking"]:::dfdProcess
    P2["1.2 Guest Check-In / Check-Out"]:::dfdProcess
    P3["1.3 Food & Service Ordering"]:::dfdProcess
    P4["1.4 Bill Generation & Payment"]:::dfdProcess
    
    D1[("D1: Room Availability DB")]:::dfdDataStore
    D2[("D2: Bookings Registry")]:::dfdDataStore
    D3[("D3: Guest Profiles")]:::dfdDataStore
    D4[("D4: Services & Orders Log")]:::dfdDataStore
    
    %% Booking
    GuestL1 -->|"Room selection & dates"| P1
    P1 -->|"Check status"| D1
    P1 -->|"Add reservation record"| D2
    P1 -->|"Booking voucher"| GuestL1

    %% Check-In / Check-Out
    ReceptionistL1 -->|"Process Guest Arrival"| P2
    P2 -->|"Retrieve booking"| D2
    P2 -->|"Create guest card"| D3
    P2 -->|"Set Room to Occupied"| D1
    
    %% Food & Service
    GuestL1 -->|"Order room service / food"| P3
    P3 -->|"Post service costs"| D4
    
    %% Bill Generation
    P4 -->|"Read base tariff details"| D2
    P4 -->|"Query service items"| D4
    P4 -->|"Query guest identity"| D3
    P4 -->|"Set room to vacant"| D1
    P4 -->|"Final invoice receipt"| GuestL1
    GuestL1 -->|"Complete payment transaction"| P4
  end
